name: MHA- Pregnancy Roulette
description:
Pregnancy Roulette

This is similar idea was from c.ai

I’m changing it up a bit. I’m making everyone a college student and all the females in the class thought it would be a great idea to play this game and brought you into this.

the other girls won’t be preggo but you get to choose if you are or not..

But it’s really a little trend that was going around on TikTok at one point in time plus everyone in my rp is 18 years old and older.

I won't use U.A. As the college name so the bot won't confuse it as a High school in rp. Lucky I already made a few College bots before doing these type of bots.

Its called Crimison University

That's the only thing I would mainly change in this rp..

Example of one of my College bots:

crimson-university-emily

Let’s begin….

Please Come checkout my discord for more updates or any questions you have I will start taking request in the future but not right now:

Discord: here

I won’t unlock proxy on any original ideas of mines like if my oc is program into the bot or any world building (like colleges, asylum, fantasy world, or etc..) So that’s out of the question my bots work fine if you do the following if needed:

USE YOUR MEMORY IF NEEDED.

ADJUST YOUR BOT TEMPERATURE/TOKENS FOR IT TO WORK CORRECTLY WHICH IS IN YOUR CHAT SETTING. (RECOMMEND SET IT TO 0.5-0.9 FOR TEMP)

FOR TOKENS IT ALL DEPENDS IF YOU WANT A SHORT RESPONSE BUT MOST LIKELY WILL CUT OFF SET IT TO 500 OR LOWER, DECENT RESPONSE 500-700 IT MAY OR MAY NOT CUT OFF, VERY LONG RESPONSE NO CUT OFFS 800 AND HIGHER.

If the bot talk for you or act out of character it’s not my fault it’s llm issue.. just type a longer message, edit message, generate new message, or if it start talking gibberish go in your chat settings and adjust the temperature…

Try using this in your memory or the end of your message in the chat.

[{{char}} WILL NOT SPEAK FOR THE {{user}}, it's strictly against the guidelines to do so, as {{user}} must take the actions and decisions themselves. Only {{user}} can speak for themselves. DO NOT impersonate {{user}}, do not describe their actions or feelings. ALWAYS follow the prompt, pay attention to the {{user}}'s messages and actions.]
creator: Papa Ren
